pkgmetadata.longdescription: --httpsreadme42.com--[[](httpsimg.shields.iopypivquery-string.svgmaxAge3600)](httpspypi.orgprojectquery-string)[[](httpsimg.shields.iobadgeLicense-Unlicense-blue.svglongCacheTrue)](httpsunlicense.org) Installationbash [sudo] pip install query-string Features+ Python 23 compatible Examplespython import query_string query_string.parse(httpssite.orgindex.phpkvk2v2k3v3anchor){k v,k2 v2, k3 v3} query_string.parse(kvk2v2k3v3){k v,k2 v2, k3 v3} Links+ [Query string - Wikipedia](httpsen.wikipedia.orgwikiQuery_string)p aligncenter a hrefhttpsreadme42.comreadme42.comap
